props.title: We transform losses into sustainable businesses.
props.subtitle: We convert surpluses into real opportunities. We integrate technology, innovation and knowledge to professionalize rural management and enhance growth.

props.title: The field faces major challenges
props.subtitle: Post-harvest losses, market volatility, and sustainability pressure still limit rural growth.
props.pillarsJson: [{"title":"Precision Hardware","body":"Modular equipment designed to optimize processes, reduce costs, and add value to production."},{"title":"Intelligence & Management Software","body":"Tools that centralize business management and production monitoring, delivering indicators and confidence for decision-making."},{"title":"Recovery & Value Management","body":"Commercial processes that turn losses into sellable products with extended shelf life, avoiding disposal emissions."},{"title":"Acceleration Methodology","body":"A practical framework to standardize quality, structure margins, and open commercial channels."}]
